property.name: note
property.value: Fighter guild: better weapon quality. Others: standard quality. Crafts 12 weapons + 24 rings.

property.name: note
property.value: Bind known spells permanently into scrolls/wands/staffs. Equip restricted by guild.

property.name: note
property.value: Lock/unlock/open/close. Thief picks (guild L3+). Fighter bashes (guild L1+). Key/master opens always.

property.name: note
property.value: Write scrolls for Arcane Door Pass, Mage Guild Recall, Home Recall, House Recall, Adventurers Recall

property.name: note
property.value: Write scrolls for Divine Door Pass, Cleric Guild Recall, Home Recall, House Recall, Adventurers Recall

property.name: note
property.value: Write scrolls for Nature Door Pass, Druid Guild Recall, Home Recall, House Recall, Adventurers Recall

property.name: note
property.value: Sells lockpicks + key-making supplies. Thief guild L3+ can make keys (higher L = better success).
